content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09D","process_rule":"1. Copy the decision table into table `J09D_temp` for all tours that start with `J09D`.

2. Add the column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09D_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `J09D_temp` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.

4. Join table `J09D_temp` with the `EABLG` table using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09D`. Use exactly these column names:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached. Use `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Copy the decision table into table `J09D_temp` for all tours that start with `J09D`.

2. Add the column `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to table `J09D_temp`.

3. Classify the meter reading type in `J09D_temp` using these rules:
   - If a `HAUS` has fewer than 3 `EQUNR`, set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `KSA`.
   - Else set `ENTSCHEIDUNG` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1 = 0` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `500` to `599` to `EVU`.
   - Set all houses with `HOUSE_NUM1` from `900` to `999` to `EVU`.

4. Join table `J09D_temp` with the `EABLG` table using `INSTALLATION`.

5. Join the result with `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER` using `EQUNR`.

6. Compare customer data from `SALES_MASTER` and `NET_MASTER`.

7. If sales customer data is not empty:
   1. Use the sales customer data table entries.
   Else:
   1. Use the net customer data table entries.

8. Export the final table as CSV file named `J09D`. Use exactly these column names:
   - `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`
   - `HAUS`
   - `ANLAGE`
   - `ME_MA_ID`
   - `EQUNR`
   - `HOUSE_NUM1`
   - `ENTSCHEIDUNG`
   - `TITLE`
   - `FORENAME`
   - `SURNAME`
   - `STREET`
   - `STREETNO`
   - `POST_CODE1`
   - `CITY1`
   - `CITY2`
   - `EMAIL`

9. Send an email to `meter.readings@evu.com` with the CSV file attached. Use `file_path: <path_to_exported_csv_file>`.

10. Delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name IN ('decision_table','EABLG','SALES_MASTER','NET_MASTER');

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09D_temp; CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%'; ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT; UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09D_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09D_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END; UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;

args.sqlite_command: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
CREATE TABLE J09D_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_talbe WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09D%';
ALTER TABLE J09D_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t2.EQUNR) FROM J09D_temp t2 WHERE t2.HAUS = J09D_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;
UPDATE J09D_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 OR HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;

args.sql_query: SELECT e.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` AS `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, t.HAUS AS `HAUS`, t.ANLAGE AS `ANLAGE`, t.ME_MA_ID AS `ME_MA_ID`, t.EQUNR AS `EQUNR`, t.HOUSE_NUM1 AS `HOUSE_NUM1`, t.ENTSCHEIDUNG AS `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.TITLE ELSE nm.TITLE END AS `TITLE`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.FORENAME ELSE nm.FORENAME END AS `FORENAME`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.SURNAME ELSE nm.SURNAME END AS `SURNAME`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.STREET ELSE nm.STREET END AS `STREET`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.STREETNO ELSE nm.STREETNO END AS `STREETNO`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.POST_CODE1 ELSE nm.POST_CODE1 END AS `POST_CODE1`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.CITY1 ELSE nm.CITY1 END AS `CITY1`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.CITY2 ELSE nm.CITY2 END AS `CITY2`, CASE WHEN COALESCE(sm.TITLE,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.FORENAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.SURNAME,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREET,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.STREETNO,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(CAST(sm.POST_CODE1 AS TEXT),'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY1,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.CITY2,'') <> '' OR COALESCE(sm.EMAIL,'') <> '' THEN sm.EMAIL ELSE nm.EMAIL END AS `EMAIL` FROM J09D_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg e ON t.ANLAGE = e.Installation LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON t.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR LEFT JOIN net_master nm ON t.EQUNR = nm.EQUNR;

args.email: Please find attached the J09D meter reading export CSV.
